glossary.definition: A company or individual formally entered into an award category.
Nominees selected by the jury for final evaluation.
The annual black-tie event at which winners are announced.
Property Technology — innovation applied to real estate processes, platforms and services.
An independent panel of senior real estate professionals who score nominations.
A company that plans, develops and manages large-scale mixed-use or township projects.
Real estate projects designed to minimise environmental impact and maximise long-term community benefit.
A building that uses automated systems and IoT to control environment, security and energy.
An official digital badge awarded to winners for use on marketing materials.
A specific area of excellence within the real estate industry for which a nomination can be submitted.
